subject: DevOps
title: SBOM: Software Bill of Materials
description: A 1-minute de-risking session on SBOM: Software Bill of Materials.

hook.text: Log4Shell hit. The CEO asked if they were affected. Nobody could answer — no one tracked dependencies.

buildup.text: An SBOM lists every component: name, version, supplier, license, and relationships. A full inventory.

discovery.text: SPDX and CycloneDX are standard SBOM formats. They're machine-readable so you can query them fast.

twist.text: SBOMs help your customers too. Sharing yours builds transparency and trust across the supply chain.

climax.text: Generate SBOMs in CI/CD. Every release gets a fresh, accurate bill of materials as an artifact.

punchline.text: Know what's in your software. An SBOM is the ingredient label.

quiz.question: What does an SBOM contain?
options: A complete list of all software components, versions, and their relationships
The source code of all dependencies
